rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code homestead exemption has no relation to Educ. Code §37.121, which addresses school fraternity, sorority, and gang offenses. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 37.121. FRATERNITIES, SORORITIES, SECRET SOCIETIES, AND GANGS.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
